title: Facilities, Racks, Cabling, Power, and Environment · Transfer Incident
summary: Plan an MDF, IDFs, racks, patching, power, cooling, security, and maintenance access for a new site. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a facilities-ready network installation package with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Place MDF and IDF spaces, rack units, pathways, grounding, clearances, and service loops from building constraints.
Document patch panels, fiber distribution panels, labels, polarity, ports, pathways, and change ownership.
Align port-side intake or exhaust, hot and cold airflow, lockable access, and maintenance reach.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
